title: Professional Email Response Templates
promptText: Create a professional email response for the following scenario: I need to reply to a [EMAIL_TYPE] email in a [TONE] tone. The context is: [SITUATION_CONTEXT]. The key points I need to address are: [KEY_POINTS]. Please write a complete email response that opens with an appropriate greeting, addresses each point clearly and concisely, maintains professionalism throughout, and closes with a clear next step or call to action. Keep the response between 150-250 words. Use proper email formatting with paragraphs, and avoid jargon unless the context requires it. If the situation involves a difficult or sensitive topic, acknowledge the other party's perspective before presenting my position. Include a subject line suggestion if this is a new thread.
description: This prompt generates polished, ready-to-send email responses for common professional scenarios including client follow-ups, meeting requests, complaint handling, project updates, and more. Instead of staring at a blank compose window trying to strike the right tone, you get a well-structured response that addresses all key points while maintaining professionalism. The prompt adapts to different tones from formal to friendly, making it useful across industries and relationship types. Particularly valuable for non-native English speakers, people managing high email volumes, or anyone who wants to communicate more effectively without spending twenty minutes on a single reply.

variables.name: EMAIL_TYPE
variables.description: The type of email you are responding to
variables.example: client follow-up after a missed deadline

variables.name: TONE
variables.description: The desired tone for the response

variables.name: SITUATION_CONTEXT
variables.example: We missed a deliverable by two days due to a vendor delay, but the project is back on track

variables.name: KEY_POINTS
variables.description: Main points to cover in the response
variables.example: acknowledge the delay, explain the cause briefly, share the new timeline, offer a goodwill gesture

tips: Specify the relationship dynamic (e.g., new client vs. long-term partner) for better tone calibration
Include any company-specific language or phrases you typically use
Mention if there are cultural considerations for the recipient
exampleOutput:
Subject: Update on Project Timeline — Back on Track

Hi Sarah,

Thank you for your patience regarding the Meridian project deliverables. I want to address the two-day delay directly — our primary vendor experienced an unexpected supply chain disruption that impacted our production schedule.

Here's where we stand now:
- All pending items are back in production as of Monday
- The revised delivery date is March 15th
- We've added a buffer day to ensure no further slips

To make up for the inconvenience, we'd like to include the additional analytics dashboard at no extra charge with this phase.

Please let me know if you'd like to schedule a quick call to walk through the updated timeline together.

Best regards,
Alex
metaTitle: Professional Email Response Templates Prompt for ChatGPT
metaDescription: Generate professional email responses for any business scenario with ChatGPT. Save time and communicate clearly.
